entries.text:
Verse 1

A beautiful order is discernible in this and the succeeding prophecies:

(1) Restoration of the land Ezekiel 36:1-15.

(2) of the people Ezekiel 36:16 to Ezekiel 37:28.

(3) judgment on Israel's enemies. Ezekiel 38:1 to Ezekiel 39:24. Afterward follows that which concerns the worship of Jehovah that He may dwell amongst His people.

Ezekiel 34

Ezekiel

Ezekiel 37

Ezekiel 36". ezekiel-36
